name: Tiotropium Bromide And Formoterol Fumarate Powder For Inhalation

specifications.Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, below 30Â°C. Protect from light and moisture.
specifications.Ingredients: Tiotropium Bromide, Formoterol Fumarate, Lactose as carrier
specifications.Usage: Used to treat Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) and Asthma

about: A: The powder should be inhaled using a standard dry powder inhaler (DPI) device once daily, or as directed by your physician. Each capsule contains a single dose and should not be swallowed.

faq.q: How should Tiotropium Bromide and Formoterol Fumarate Powder for Inhalation be used?
faq.a: The powder should be inhaled using a standard dry powder inhaler (DPI) device once daily, or as directed by your physician. Each capsule contains a single dose and should not be swallowed.

faq.q: What are the primary benefits of this medication for COPD and asthma?
faq.a: This combination provides long-lasting bronchodilation, improves lung function, and helps reduce the frequency of COPD and asthma symptoms, leading to better daily respiratory health.

faq.q: When should I use this inhalation powder?
faq.a: Take the medication at the same time each day, as prescribed by your doctor. Follow their instructions closely and do not exceed the recommended dose.

faq.q: Where should I store the capsules?
faq.a: Store the capsules in a cool, dry place below 30C. Protect them from light and moisture to maintain the powder's effectiveness.

faq.q: Is this inhaler suitable for children?
faq.a: No, this product is not recommended for use in children under 18 years of age.

faq.q: What devices are compatible with this inhalation powder?
faq.a: This medication is designed for use with standard dry powder inhalers (DPI); always check with your healthcare provider or pharmacist if unsure.

faq.q: What should I do if I miss a dose?
faq.a: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for your next dose, skip the missed dose and resume your regular schedule. Do not take two doses at once.
